questions.question: The engineer adjusted the lever to release the pressure.
options: The child used a lever to open the toy chest.
A lot of money is needed to lever the unions into accepting a deal.
The farmer repaired the broken lever on the plough.
The worker cleaned the lever before using it again.
questions.solution: A lot of money is needed to lever the unions into accepting a deal. Question में , ‘lever’ का प्रयोग एक noun के रूप में किया गया है जिसका अर्थ है किसी चीज को हिलाने या उठाने के लिए इस्तेमाल की जाने वाली छड़। Option (b) में , इसका प्रयोग एक verb के रूप में किया गया है जिसका अर्थ है किसी को कुछ करने के लिए दबाव डालना , जो इसे एक homonym बनाता है।

questions.question: The monk wore a plain habit made of coarse wool.
options: The tailor stitched a new habit for the ceremonial robe.
Rising early had become a difficult habit to maintain.
The abbey’s habit was dyed a darker brown for winter.
The costume designer studied the habit worn in medieval plays.
questions.solution: Rising early had become a difficult habit to maintain. दिए गये question में , ‘habit’ का अर्थ है एक धार्मिक संप्रदाय के सदस्यों , जैसे भिक्षुओं (monks) और भिक्षुणियों (nuns) द्वारा पहना जाने वाला एक वस्त्र। Option (b) में , ‘habit’ एक नियमित अभ्यास या रिवाज (custom) को refer करता है , जो एक ही शब्द का एक अलग अर्थ है। अतः , option (b) में highlighted word का homonym है।

questions.question: The sailors struggled to control the ship during the violent gale .
options: The fishermen waited for the gale to subside before setting out again.
The meteorologist warned that a gale might reach the coastline by nightfall.
The audience burst into a gale of laughter at the comedian’s remark.
The storm intensified into a powerful gale by early morning.
questions.solution: The audience burst into a gale of laughter at the comedian’s remark. प्रश्न में ‘gale’ का अर्थ है बहुत तेज़ हवा। Option (c) में दिया गया homonym उस अर्थ में प्रयोग हुआ है जो अचानक ज़ोरदार हँसी (a sudden burst of loud laughter) को दर्शाता है।

questions.question: The seal was carved into the wax to close the letter.
options: The explorer watched a seal basking on the icy shore.
The clerk examined the seal for any cracks.
The nobleman pressed his ring into the soft seal.
The messenger delivered the letter with the royal seal.
questions.solution: The explorer watched a seal basking on the icy shore. Question में , 'seal' किसी चीज़ को प्रमाणित करने या बंद करने के लिए इस्तेमाल की जाने वाली मुहर (stamp) या उपकरण (device) को refer करता है , जबकि option (a) में , 'seal' एक समुद्री जानवर (marine animal) को refer करता है। दोनों की spelling same है लेकिन उनके अर्थ पूरी तरह से अलग हैं। अतः , option (a) में highlighted word का homonym है।

questions.question: The current in the river was too strong for swimming.
options: The sailor struggled against the rapid current.
The fisherman measured the depth of the current.
The swimmer floated easily in the calm current.
The journalist reported on the current political developments.
questions.solution: The journalist reported on the current political developments. Question में 'Current' का अर्थ है जल की गति। Option (d) में 'Current' का अर्थ है वर्तमान समय से संबंधित। ये दोनों word, same spelling होने के बावजूद अलग - अलग अर्थ व्यक्त करते हैं। अतः option (d) में highlighted word का homonym है।

questions.question: The nail held the frame securely to the wall.
options: The carpenter hammered another nail into the wood.
She painted each nail with a bright red polish.
The builder removed the bent nail from the plank.
The shopkeeper sold a box of iron nails.
questions.solution: She painted each nail with a bright red polish. Question में , 'nail' वस्तुओं को कसने (fasten) के लिए उपयोग किए जाने वाले एक छोटे धातु के कील (metal spike) को refer करता है , जबकि option (b) में , यह उंगलियों या पैर की उंगलियों के सिरों को ढंकने वाली कठोर सतह को refer करता है। Spelling same है , लेकिन अर्थ भिन्न हैं। अतः , option (b) में दिए गए word का homonym है।

questions.question: The archbishop delivered his sermon beneath the grand see of Canterbury.
options: The sailor strained his eyes to see through the fog.
The pilgrims gathered at the ancient see for prayer.
The cathedral’s see was decorated with intricate mosaics.
The bishop’s see encompassed several parishes.
questions.solution: The sailor strained his eyes to see through the fog. दिए गए sentence में , highlighted word “see” (noun) एक bishop के अधिकार क्षेत्र को संदर्भित करता है , यह एक noun है जिसका अर्थ “bishopric या diocese” है। Option (a) में , see का अर्थ आंखों से देखना , जो कि एक पूरी तरह से अलग अर्थ है। अतः , Option (a) सबसे उपयुक्त उत्तर है।

questions.question: The bark of the old oak tree was rough to the touch.
options: The hunter followed the bark of the dog through the dense forest.
The bark peeled away easily after the rain.
The gardener studied the texture of the bark carefully.
The bark of the tree protected it from pests.
questions.solution: The hunter followed the bark of the dog through the dense forest. दिए गए sentence में , “bark” एक पेड़ के बाहरी आवरण को संदर्भित करता है , जबकि option (a) में , “bark” एक कुत्ते द्वारा की गई आवाज़ ( भौकना ) को संदर्भित करता है — जो same word का बिल्कुल अलग अर्थ है। अतः , option (a) सबसे उपयुक्त उत्तर है।

questions.question: They signed a contract to supply construction materials for the new city bridge.
options: The company renewed its contract with the suppliers for another five years.
The legal experts reviewed the contract thoroughly before it was finalised.
The cold weather can cause your muscles to contract suddenly and painfully.
The parties involved agreed that the contract terms were fair and binding.
questions.solution: The cold weather can cause your muscles to contract suddenly and painfully. दिए गये question में word "contract" का अर्थ है एक कानूनी समझौता , जबकि option (c) में इसका अर्थ है सिकुड़ना (shrink) या छोटा होना। दोनों word की spelling same हैं लेकिन उनके अर्थ भिन्न हैं। अतः , option (c) में सबसे उपयुक्त homonym है।

questions.question: The sculptor tried to chisel away the excess marble.
options: His jaw was finely chiseled, a sign of his strong will.
The con man tried to chisel me out of my money.
She used a small chisel for the intricate details.
The inscription was chiseled into the stone tablet.
questions.solution: The con man tried to chisel me out of my money. दिए गए Question में , “chisel” का अर्थ है पत्थर को काटना या आकार देना , जबकि option (b) में , “chisel” का अर्थ है किसी को धोखा देना या ठगना। दोनों की spelling same है लेकिन अर्थ अलग - अलग हैं। अतः , option (b) सबसे उपयुक्त उत्तर है।

questions.question: Select the sentence containing the homonym of the word ‘mantle’ (a cloak or covering).
options: The knight’s mantle fluttered as he entered the hall.
The earth’s mantle lies between the crust and the core.
The princess’s mantle was woven with golden threads.
A mantle of snow covered the silent town.
questions.solution: The earth’s mantle lies between the crust and the core. Option (b) में word 'mantle' भू - पर्पटी (crust) एवं उसके कोर के बीच की परत को संदर्भित करता है। अतः , option (b) सबसे उपयुक्त उत्तर है।

questions.question: Please write your full address along with the postal code on this form.
options: The secretary wrote the wrong address on the envelope by mistake.
I received your letter even though it had an incomplete address.
The Prime Minister will address the youth at the national conference tomorrow.
The manager confirmed that the letter was sent to the right address.
questions.solution: The Prime Minister will address the youth at the national conference tomorrow. दिए गये question में , word 'address' उस place के विवरण को refer करता है जहाँ कोई रहता है। Option (c) में , word 'address' का अर्थ है लोगों के समूह को एक औपचारिक भाषण देना। दोनों की spelling same हैं लेकिन अर्थ भिन्न हैं। अतः , option (c) में दिए गए word का सबसे उपयुक्त homonym है।

questions.question: The hunter aimed his bow carefully before releasing the arrow.
options: She gave a graceful bow after her performance.
The bow was crafted from fine yew wood.
He tightened the string on his bow before hunting.
The archer cleaned his bow and arrows after practice.
questions.solution: She gave a graceful bow after her performance. दिए गए sentence में , word "bow" का अर्थ है तीर चलाने के लिए इस्तेमाल किया जाने वाला हथियार। Option (a) में , "bow" सम्मान या स्वीकृति के संकेत के रूप में शरीर को आगे झुकाने की क्रिया को संदर्भित करता है। अतः , option (a) सबसे उपयुक्त उत्तर है।

questions.question: The dancer's movements were so graceful and ethereal , she seemed to float across the stage.
options: The faint, shimmering aurora created an ethereal glow in the night sky.
The old tale spoke of ethereal beings dwelling in the mists of the enchanted forest.
The chemist carefully prepared the ethereal solution by dissolving the compound in diethyl ether.
Her voice had an ethereal quality, delicate and otherworldly, enchanting all who heard it.
questions.solution: The chemist carefully prepared the ethereal solution by dissolving the compound in diethyl ether. Main sentence ( और option a, b, d) में 'ethereal' word का अर्थ है कुछ ऐसा जो अत्यंत नाजुक , हल्का और इस दुनिया का नहीं है। Option (c) 'ethereal' word का एक विशिष्ट अर्थ में उपयोग करता है , जिसका अर्थ है 'diethyl ether का एक solvent के रूप में होना ' । अतः , option (c) में सबसे उपयुक्त homonym है।

questions.question: The right answer was not immediately clear.
options: She made a right turn at the next intersection.
He was right to refuse the offer. search on TG -@freepdfhall
Everyone has the right to free speech.
The right timing can make all the difference.
questions.solution: Everyone has the right to free speech. दिए गए sentence में highlighted word "right" का अर्थ है "correct" । Option (c) में , "right" का अर्थ " एक नैतिक या कानूनी हक " है , जो कि एक homonym है। अतः , option (c) सबसे उपयुक्त उत्तर है।

questions.question: She wore a delicate veil over her face during the ceremony.
options: The fog began to veil the mountains.
The bride adjusted her veil before walking down the aisle.
The veil was made of silk and lace.
The designer created a new veil for the model.
questions.solution: The fog began to veil the mountains. Highlighted word “veil” का अर्थ है चेहरे या सिर पर पहना जाने वाला कपड़े का एक टुकड़ा। Option (a) में word "veil" का अर्थ है किसी चीज़ को ढंकना , छिपाना या अस्पष्ट करना। अतः , option (a) सबसे उपयुक्त उत्तर है।

questions.question: The quarry was abandoned after the limestone was exhausted.
options: The workers drilled deep into the quarry for new material.
The supervisor inspected the quarry’s safety measures.
The miners transported tools to the quarry entrance.
The hunters pursued their quarry through the forest.
questions.solution: The hunters pursued their quarry through the forest. दिए गये question में , ‘quarry’ का अर्थ है एक ऐसी जगह जहाँ पत्थर या खनिज (mineral) निकाले जाते हैं , जबकि option (d) में , ‘quarry’ का अर्थ है शिकार किया जा रहा जानवर या व्यक्ति। दोनों word की spelling same है लेकिन अर्थ भिन्न हैं। अतः , option (d) में दिए गए word का homonym है।

questions.question: The archaeologist discovered a buried crypt .
options: The poem was written in a crypt style no one could decipher.
The crypt beneath the cathedral held ancient tombs.
The crypt contained relics of early saints.
Visitors were not allowed inside the crypt after dusk.
questions.solution: The poem was written in a crypt style no one could decipher. दिए गए sentence में , word "crypt" का अर्थ है दफन (burial) के लिए उपयोग किया जाने वाला एक भूमिगत कक्ष। Option (a) में , word "crypt" का प्रयोग एक अलग अर्थ में किया गया search on TG -@freepdfhall है , जिसका अर्थ कुछ गुप्त या अर्थ में छिपा हुआ है। अतः , option (a) सबसे उपयुक्त उत्तर है।

questions.question: The actors waited for the director’s signal before producing sound .
options: The technician adjusted the sound levels on the recording.
The musician tested the sound before the concert began.
The engineer designed a sound barrier along the highway.
The sailors spotted the sound of the bay as the fog lifted.
questions.solution: The sailors spotted the sound of the bay as the fog lifted. दिए गये question में , ‘sound’ का अर्थ कुछ ऐसा है जो हम सुनते हैं या हवा के माध्यम से यात्रा करने वाले कंपन जिसे सुना जा सकता है। Option (d) में , ‘sound’ का अर्थ है पानी के दो बड़े निकायों को जोड़ने वाला पानी का एक संकीर्ण खिंचाव (narrow stretch) । अतः , option (d) में दिए गए word का homonym है।

questions.question: The eagle perched on a wooden stake fixed firmly near the cliff.
options: The shepherd placed a long stake to mark the grazing area.
The hunter hammered a sharp stake into the ground.
The investor held a large stake in the new company’s future.
The gardener removed the stake supporting the young plant.
questions.solution: The investor held a large stake in the new company’s future. Question में ‘stake’ का अर्थ है ज़मीन में गाड़ा गया खंभा (a post driven into the ground) । जबकि option (c) में ‘stake’ का अर्थ है वित्तीय हिस्सेदारी या रुचि (a financial share or interest) । अतः option (c) में दिए गए word का सबसे उपयुक्त homonym है।

questions.question: The explorer was struck by the eerie beauty of the moonlit moraine along the glacier’s edge.
options: The hikers rested on the moraine before continuing their climb up the icy slope.
The old painter described his cluttered studio as a moraine of forgotten dreams.
The scientists collected rock samples from the moraine for carbon dating.
The guide pointed to the moraine that marked the glacier’s retreat over centuries.
questions.solution: The old painter described his cluttered studio as a moraine of forgotten dreams. दिए गये question में , ‘moraine’ का अर्थ है एक हिमनद द्वारा बहाकर लाये गए तथा निक्षेपित किए गए चट्टानों एवं तलछट का ढेर। Option (b) में , इसका प्रयोग लाक्षणिक रूप से एक भ्रमित ढेर (confused heap) या संचय (accumulation) के अर्थ में किया गया है। इस प्रकार , same word के अलग - अलग अर्थ हैं। अतः , option (b) में दिए गए word का homonym है।

questions.question: The temper of the steel determined its flexibility under stress.
options: His fiery temper made collaboration almost impossible.
The scientist measured the temper of various alloys for conductivity.
The forge-master studied the temper before applying the final polish.
The miner tested the temper of the ore before extraction.
questions.solution: His fiery temper made collaboration almost impossible. दिए गए sentence में , “temper of the steel” का अर्थ है धातु को गर्म करने और ठंडा करने से उत्पन्न कठोरता या मजबूती। Option (a) में , “fiery temper” का अर्थ है गुस्सा या मिजाज , जो एक ही word के एक अलग अर्थ है। अतः , option (a) सबसे उपयुक्त उत्तर है।

questions.question: The philosopher referred to the ancient canon that guided monastic life.
options: The cathedral choir rehearsed a complex canon for the Easter service.
The council reaffirmed the moral canon of the early church.
The theologian translated a lost canon into Latin.
The scribe copied the canon onto parchment scrolls.
questions.solution: The cathedral choir rehearsed a complex canon for the Easter service. दिए गये question में , ‘canon’ का अर्थ है नियम और सिद्धांत या आधिकारिक लेखन (authoritative writings), जबकि option (a) में , इसका अर्थ है संगीत का एक ऐसा भाग जिसमें आवाजें निश्चित अंतरालों पर क्रमिक रूप से प्रवेश करती हैं। अतः , option (a) में दिए गए word का homonym है।

questions.question: The knight began to hew his way through the dense forest with a heavy sword.
options: The sculptor tried to hew a statue out of a single block of marble.
He continued to hew to his principles even under political pressure.
The workers were told to hew the logs into equal sections.
The carpenter was skilled enough to hew complex shapes with precision.
questions.solution: He continued to hew to his principles even under political pressure. दिए गए sentence में , "hew" का अर्थ है तलवार या कुल्हाड़ी जैसे उपकरण का उपयोग करके किसी चीज़ को काटना या उसमें से रास्ता बनाना। Option (b) में , "hew" का प्रयोग एक अलग अर्थ वाले homonym के रूप में किया गया है , जिसका अर्थ है किसी चीज़ ( जैसे नियम या सिद्धांत ) का कड़ाई से पालन करना या उसके अनुरूप होना। अतः , option (b) सबसे उपयुक्त उत्तर है।

questions.question: The pall was drawn over the casket before the final hymn.
options: The mourners adjusted the silk pall carefully during the rite.
The craftsman embroidered the pall with golden thread.
The evening gloom cast a pall over the once-cheerful village.
The bishop blessed the ceremonial pall before Mass.
questions.solution: The evening gloom cast a pall over the once-cheerful village. दिए गये question में , 'pall' का तात्पर्य अंतिम संस्कार समारोहों (funeral ceremonies) के दौरान ताबूत (coffin) या शवपेटिका (casket) पर बिछाए गए कपड़े से है। Option (c) में , 'pall' का अर्थ है उदासी (gloom), दुःख (sorrow) या निराशा (despondency) की भावना। दोनों word की spelling same है लेकिन इसका अर्थ भिन्न है। अतः , option (c) में दिए गए word का homonym है।

questions.question: The sculptor used fine mould to cast the statue’s intricate details.
options: The damp basement began to develop green mould on the walls.
She moulds her opinions based on popular trends.
They decided to mould the clay into decorative shapes.
He was praised for his creative mould of leadership.
questions.solution: The damp basement began to develop green mould on the walls. दिए गए sentence में , "mould" का अर्थ है molten या soft material को आकार देने के लिए उपयोग किया जाने वाला एक खोखला कंटेनर। Option (a) में , "mould" का प्रयोग नम परिस्थितियों में उगने वाले कवक (fungus) के लिए किया गया है , जो मूल word का homonym (same spelling, different meaning) है। अतः , option (a) सबसे उपयुक्त उत्तर है।

questions.question: The physicist measured the mole of the substance carefully.
options: The gardener found a mole burrowing under the soil.
The student solved an equation for a mole fraction.
The chemist mixed one mole of hydrogen with chlorine.
The teacher explained the mole concept in class.
questions.solution: The gardener found a mole burrowing under the soil. Word “mole” chemistry में माप की एक वैज्ञानिक इकाई को refer करता है। Option (a) में , mole एक छोटे बिल खोदने वाले जानवर (small burrowing animal) को refer करता है , जिसकी spelling same है लेकिन अर्थ भिन्न है , जिससे यह एक homonym बन जाता है। अतः , option (a) सबसे उपयुक्त उत्तर है।

questions.question: The priest placed the host upon the paten during Mass.
options: The monk lifted the host with reverence.
The baker prepared the unleavened host for communion.
